Description: PREMIUM CHROME VANADIUM STEEL: Crafted from high-quality chrome vanadium steel, these ring spanners are built to last. The durable material ensures longevity and reliability for both home and professional use. They provide easy access to nuts and bolts in confined spaces, making tasks more convenient. CHROME PLATED FINISH: Each spanner is meticulously chrome plated, offering excellent resistance to corrosion and rust. This protective finish not only enhances their appearance but also prolongs their lifespan. SET OF 10 SPANNERS: This set includes a total of 10 ring spanners, providing a wide range of sizes to meet different needs. From small to large nuts and bolts, you'll have the right tool for the job.
